title: What Is AI Pair Programming? AI Coding Tools for Developers
summary: IBM Technology explains AI pair programming and how AI coding tools transform developer workflows. The video covers how AI assists with debugging, code review, and productivity improvements for developers.
writeup: IBM Technology defines AI pair programming and outlines how AI coding tools reshape developer workflows. The video addresses AI assistance with debugging, code review, and productivity gains, drawing on concepts such as natural language programming and code generation. The takeaway is a framing of AI as a collaborator that supports core development tasks rather than a standalone replacement for them.
